name: Paycom
description: Paycom is a cloud-based Human Capital Management (HCM) platform that combines payroll, HR, time tracking, and other key functions

config.setupInstructions:
1. Contact your Paycom representative to enable API access
2. Obtain your API Base URL, Client ID, and Client Secret
3. Ensure your API user has read access to employee data and user roles
4. Enter all values below

credentialFields.label: API Base URL
credentialFields.helpText: Your Paycom API base URL, provided by your Paycom representative (e.g. https://api.paycom.com)

credentialFields.label: Client ID
credentialFields.helpText: OAuth Client ID provided by Paycom for API access

credentialFields.label: Client Secret
credentialFields.helpText: OAuth Client Secret provided by Paycom for API access

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Verifies that employee records are accessible through the Paycom API

checks.name: Role-based Access Controls
checks.description: Verifies that user roles and permissions are configured in Paycom
